scripts.db:generate: node scripts/run-with-workspace-env.mjs pnpm exec prisma generate --schema apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate: node scripts/run-with-workspace-env.mjs pnpm exec prisma migrate dev --schema apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma --name init
scripts.db:deploy: node scripts/run-with-workspace-env.mjs pnpm exec prisma migrate deploy --schema apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:seed: node scripts/run-with-workspace-env.mjs pnpm --filter @daftar/api exec prisma db seed
